name: Axiom Perception MCP
description: Persistent memory and pattern learning for AI agents. Never re-learn the same workflow twice — save proven steps, recall them before any task, track success rates, and sync with community-contributed patterns for Twitter, GitHub, LinkedIn, and more. Works alongside Playwright MCP and any automation tool.

tools.name: recall_pattern
tools.description: Get the best known workflow for a task before attempting it

tools.name: save_pattern
tools.description: Save a workflow that successfully completed a task

tools.name: update_pattern
tools.description: Replace a pattern with a better or faster solution

tools.name: record_outcome
tools.description: Track success/failure after executing a pattern

tools.name: list_patterns
tools.description: Browse all known patterns filtered by app or category

tools.name: export_pattern
tools.description: Export a pattern as shareable JSON for community contribution
